name: The Buy Back Store
description_short: San Antonio cash buyer with two locations purchasing gold, silver, electronics, gift cards, and collectibles for immediate cash payouts.
description_long:
The Buy Back Store is a San Antonio, Texas-based secondhand buying operation with at least two physical retail locations — one at 5108 Broadway Street and one at 660 SW Military Drive. The business positions itself as a cash-for-items buyer, acquiring unwanted gold, silver, electronics, and collectibles directly from the public. No verified founding year is publicly available, and the company operates a basic B12Sites-hosted website rather than a custom domain. It lacks a confirmed BBB listing, leaving its accreditation status unverified. The company markets itself as employing "registered precious metal specialists" using regulated scales for precious metal transactions, though these claims originate from its own marketing materials and have not been independently certified.

The Buy Back Store accepts a wide variety of items for immediate cash purchase. In precious metals, they buy gold jewelry from 10k to 24k, scrap gold, bullion, and silver jewelry — advertising up to 120% payout on select silver jewelry. Beyond metals, they purchase name-brand electronics and power tools, gift cards, designer clothing and luxury accessories, collectibles, vintage items, college textbooks, and costume jewelry. There are no loan products, no subscription plans, and no financing services offered. The model is strictly transactional: customers bring in items, receive an offer, and are paid on the spot.

The Buy Back Store has built a strong local reputation, holding a 5.0/5 Google rating from 279 reviews — an unusually high score for a secondhand buyer. The company markets itself on competitive payouts, explicitly claiming to beat competitor prices and advertising above-100% payouts on certain silver items. Two San Antonio locations provide geographic convenience across the city's north and south sides. The use of regulated scales for precious metal weighing is a basic consumer protection measure that sets them apart from informal or unlicensed buyers operating without oversight.

For San Antonio residents looking to liquidate gold, silver, or other unwanted valuables, The Buy Back Store presents genuine local appeal backed by strong peer reviews. The breadth of accepted items — from textbooks to luxury accessories to gift cards — makes it more versatile than a traditional gold-only buyer. However, the absence of a BBB listing, a minimal website with no online quote tool or transparent pricing schedule, and an unverified business history mean consumers have limited third-party validation to rely on. Customers must visit in person to receive any offer, and the service area is strictly local to San Antonio.
address: 660 SW Military Dr SUITE V, San Antonio, TX 78221

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — business purchases items from customers rather than charging service fees.

pros: 5.0/5 Google rating from 279 reviews — exceptionally strong local reputation for a secondhand buyer
Advertises up to 120% payout on select silver jewelry, above standard market rates
Accepts unusually wide range of items including gift cards, textbooks, and designer clothing — not just metals
Two San Antonio locations (Broadway and SW Military Drive) covering different parts of the city
Claims to use regulated scales for precious metal transactions, a basic consumer protection measure
Active on Facebook and X, providing a channel for customer inquiries before visiting
cons: No BBB listing found — accreditation and complaint history are unverified
Website is a basic B12Sites-hosted landing page with no online quote tool or published pricing schedule
Founding year and corporate history are unverified — no independently confirmed track record
Strictly local to San Antonio — no shipping, mail-in, or remote transaction option
No third-party certifications for precious metal handling beyond company's own marketing claims
best_for: San Antonio residents looking to sell gold or silver jewelry for immediate cash
Individuals with unwanted electronics, power tools, or gift cards to liquidate
People clearing out estates or inherited collections of valuables and collectibles
Consumers who want a broader buyer than a traditional pawn shop or gold-only dealer
diagnosis: The Buy Back Store is best suited for San Antonio locals who want to sell gold, silver, electronics, or other valuables quickly without the loan-and-reclaim model of a traditional pawn shop. Its 5.0 Google rating across nearly 280 reviews is a genuine signal of customer satisfaction. The main caveat is the absence of any BBB listing, transparent online pricing, or independently verified certifications — consumers should get competing offers before committing.
services: Buy silver jewelry (up to 120% payout on select items)
Buy designer clothing and luxury accessories
